title: Dee's Craftable Chainmail
description: Adds a unique, vanilla-friendly way to craft chainmail armor
body:
![The title logo for Dee's Craftable Chainmail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98b957845750293b751f1da18e2d9070c51c1ea9.png)

## 🔗 Introduction
This mod adds an easy, unique, and most importantly, vanilla-friendly way to craft chainmail items in your game through the addition of chainmail sheets! A chainmail sheet can be crafted with two chains and two iron nuggets, and the recipes for chainmail armor using these sheets are about what you'd expect. The crafting recipe for chains has also been changed to give four chains instead of one in order to balance out the requirements for crafting chainmail compared to other armor sets!

## 🔧 Update Plans
While I can't guarantee it happening soon, I do have plans to release this mod for other mod loaders (Neoforge and Forge) and other past versions (most likely 1.16.X to 1.20.X). Stay tuned if these are versions/loaders you're wanting this mod for!

## ⛅ Aether Support
This mod also has built-in support for [the Aether mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) by adding a recipe for chainmail gloves.
